message.content:
{
  "competency_groups": [
    {
      "code": "PH-XII-U4-C1",
      "title": "Electromagnetic Induction Competencies",
      "description": "Mastering the principles of electromagnetic induction and its applications.",
      "competencies": [
        "Explain Faraday's Law of Electromagnetic Induction",
        "Apply Lenz's Law to determine direction of induced current",
        "Analyze self-inductance and mutual inductance phenomena"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-IV Electromagnetic Induction and Alternating Currents",
      "chapter_name": "Electromagnetic Induction"
    },
    {
      "code": "PH-XII-U4-C2",
      "title": "Alternating Current Competencies",
      "description": "Understanding the fundamentals of alternating currents in circuits.",
      "competencies": [
        "Derive expressions for instantaneous and RMS values of AC",
        "Analyze behavior of L, C, and R components in AC circuits",
        "Calculate resonance frequency and Q-factor in series LC circuits"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit-IV Electromagnetic Induction and Alternating Currents",
      "chapter_name": "Alternating Current"
    },
    {
      "code": "PH-XII-U5-C1",
      "title": "Electromagnetic Waves Competencies",
      "description": "Exploring the nature, properties, and spectrum of electromagnetic waves.",
      "competencies": [
        "Describe the transverse nature of electromagnetic waves",
        "Explain the relationship between electric and magnetic fields in EM waves",
        "Identify regions of the electromagnetic spectrum based on frequency"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit–V Electromagnetic Waves",
      "chapter_name": "Electromagnetic Waves"
    },
    {
      "code": "PH-XII-U6-C1",
      "title": "Ray Optics and Optical Instruments Competencies",
      "description": "Applying laws of reflection, refraction, and optical instrument principles.",
      "competencies": [
        "Apply Snell's Law to solve problems involving refraction at spherical surfaces",
        "Derive the lens maker's formula for thin lenses",
        "Explain the working principle of microscopes and telescopes"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit–VI Optics",
      "chapter_name": "Ray Optics and Optical Instruments"
    },
    {
      "code": "PH-XII-U6-C2",
      "title": "Wave Optics Competencies",
      "description": "Investigating wave phenomena such as interference, diffraction, and polarization.",
      "competencies": [
        "Explain Young's double-slit experiment and derive fringe width formula",
        "Analyze conditions for constructive and destructive interference",
        "Describe the phenomenon of polarization and its applications"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit–VI Optics",
      "chapter_name": "Wave Optics"
    }
  ]
}
